### 🤖 Generator Scripts

**11. Python Generator Script**
```
Filename:     generate_playlists_v2.py
Language:     Python 3
Status:       ✅ Tested and working

Purpose:      Automate generation of all 6 unique playlist HTML pages
              from template and configurations.

Usage:        python3 generate_playlists_v2.py

Output:       Generates 6 {id}-index.html files in Downloads directory

Features:
  ✓ Reads seo-optimized-playlist-template.html
  ✓ Imports configurations from seo-playlist-generator.js
  ✓ Generates unique Schema.org JSON-LD for each playlist
  ✓ Replaces all SEO markers in template
```
